mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order_item (order_id, cloth_id, cloth_name, cloth_size, amount, price, operator_id) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{clothId}, #{clothName}, #{clothSize}, #{amount}, #{price}, #{operatorId})

INSERT INTO t_order_item (order_id, cloth_id, cloth_name, cloth_size, amount, price, operator_id) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.clothId}, #{item.clothName}, #{item.clothSize}, #{item.amount}, #{item.price}, #{item.operatorId})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM t_order_item WHERE order_id IN
#{id}
